extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports matters involving the Company and Directors, with no criminal row; I counted the against-side statutory/regulatory rows (2 against the Company plus 1 against a Director) separately from the 23 direct and indirect tax proceedings against the Company, and excluded no “By” rows because none are shown. The quantified aggregate against the Company is ₹212.38 million, comprising ₹15.07 million material civil litigation, ₹5.62 million statutory/regulatory actions, and ₹191.69 million tax proceedings; no subsidiary-specific amount is disclosed. The contingent-liabilities table is dated September 30, 2020 and uses ₹ million; because no stated total row is provided, the disclosed line items sum to ₹198.77 million, or ₹19.877 crore, while the litigation aggregate converts to ₹21.238 crore. Customer concentration is company-wide and based on revenue from operations; for the latest full fiscal year, Fiscal 2020, top 10 customers represented 51.70%, while no top-five percentage is disclosed. The auditor discussion states that opinions were not modified and describes emphases of matter, so it is classified as emphasis-of-matter only.
